# Maroa

> The AI marketing operating system for freelancers, agencies, and small
> businesses. Runs content, ads, CRO, SEO, and reporting across every
> client with a full reasoning trace. Compliance built in. No black boxes.

Maroa is built by an independent team in Tirana, Albania. Pricing is
public, monthly, and cancel-anytime. There is no free tier and no trial.

---

## What Maroa does

- **Content Studio** — generates social posts, ad copy, emails, blog
  posts, landing-page copy. Grounded in 28 proven marketing frameworks,
  the client's brand voice, and what has historically worked for the
  same industry+region+budget cohort.
- **Campaigns** — daily audit of every active Meta + Google Ad with
  scale/pause/keep/optimize/refresh decisions. Each decision is logged
  with the inputs, the score breakdown, the reasoning, and the expected
  upside.
- **Creative Studio** — generates ad variants daily, A/B tests them on
  1% of budget, promotes winners, kills losers.
- **CRO** — audits landing pages on 50+ checks, rewrites copy in the
  business's voice, ships variations.
- **AI-SEO** — citability audit for ChatGPT/Perplexity/Claude/Google AI
  Overviews. Generates llms.txt + JSON-LD schemas. Tracks brand
  mentions across AI assistants.
- **Reporting** — weekly scorecard with narrative interpretation.
  Designer-grade HTML email. Plain-text fallback. Mobile-optimized.

## Pricing

- **Growth ($149/month):** up to 5 clients per workspace. Best for
  freelancers managing several clients or a single SMB.
- **Agency ($599/month):** up to 50 clients per workspace. White-label
  reports. Approval flows. Team roles. Best for marketing agencies.
- **Enterprise:** custom — talk to us at hello@maroa.ai.

## Who Maroa is for

- Freelance marketers managing 5-20 clients who need to scale without
  hiring.
- Marketing agencies running 20-50 clients who want every client to feel
  like a senior strategist is on it daily.
- Small businesses ($5-500/day ad budgets) that can't justify hiring
  an in-house marketer.

## What makes Maroa different

- **Reasoning trace on every decision.** Customers see what Maroa
  considered, what it chose, why, expected upside, confidence, and
  required approvals. No black box.
- **Compliance gates, not warnings.** Maroa hard-blocks (not warns)
  on copy that violates FDA, FTC, FCA, SEC, ABA, or platform policy.
  20 industry rulesets including healthcare, finance, alcohol,
  supplements, legal, real estate.
- **Cold-start corpus.** Day-1 customers retrieve from a pre-trained
  library of 50,000+ marketing examples — Cannes/Effie/D&AD winners,
  Meta Ad Library expert brands, Google Places top cohorts. New
  customers don't start from an empty table.
- **Marketing Graph (in development).** Every business → offers →
  claims → ads → revenue events connected. Outcomes compound across
  customers and time.

## FAQ

**Q: Is there a free trial?**
A: No. Maroa is a senior-marketer-replacement product. Pricing is
$149/month for Growth and $599/month for Agency, cancel anytime.

**Q: What is a "client"?**
A: A distinct brand/business with its own brand voice, audience, ad
accounts, and report. Workspaces hold multiple clients on Agency tier.

**Q: Does Maroa post automatically?**
A: Only when you set autopilot to on for that client. Default is
"approve every post" so nothing ships without you seeing it.

**Q: How does Maroa handle data?**
A: Customer data is stored in Supabase (EU + US regions). OAuth tokens
are encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM. We are GDPR-compliant. See
/privacy and /dpa.

**Q: What models does Maroa use?**
A: Anthropic Claude 4.x (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) for reasoning + writing.
Higgsfield for image/video generation. OpenAI text-embedding-3-small
for semantic search. Models can be swapped per task.

**Q: Can I see Maroa's reasoning?**
A: Yes. Every output ships with a reasoning trace. Click "Show
reasoning" on any decision to see the inputs, candidates considered,
critique, and the chosen variant.

**Q: What integrations does Maroa support?**
A: Meta Graph v21 (Facebook + Instagram + Threads ads + organic),
Google Ads v18, Ayrshare (LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok, YouTube), Paddle
+ Stripe (payments), Resend (email).
